subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Upon thee be My Glory! The letter of the illustrious Abu'l-Faḍl—upon him be My Glory—which was addressed unto thee lieth before Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد علیک بهائی نامه جناب ابوالفضل علیه بهائی که بانجناب نوشته امام وجه حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @goodly deeds; actions
